all.label: All modalities
all.description: Counts all datasets in the catalog, regardless of modality.

neuroimaging.label: Neuroimaging
neuroimaging.description: Imaging-based data that can support AD phenotyping, subtyping, and early detection (e.g., MRI, PET).

genetics_proteomics.label: Genetics & Proteomics
genetics_proteomics.description: Molecular layers used to study genetic risk, ancestry, and downstream pathways (genetics and proteomics).

exposomics.label: Exposomics
exposomics.description: Non-genetic exposures across the life course (environment, social determinants, lifestyle) that shape risk and resilience.
